changelog: 🔧 Fixed robbery missions not starting when both CheckForMoney and CheckForItem are disabled
🔧 Fixed issue where selecting a robbery level closed the menu without creating the route, blip, or waypoint
🔧 Fixed mission start logic so robberies now start correctly with money check only, item check only, both checks, or no checks
🔧 Fixed broken item requirement callback variable that prevented item-check mode from working correctly
🔧 Fixed incorrect extra callback argument in the item-check flow
🔧 Fixed server notification events that were missing the target player source
🔧 Fixed item count variables being global instead of local to prevent unwanted state conflicts
